label: the old alert loop
description: The automated Emergency Alert loop — the sound of the old world running down (GDD XIII). It plays from run start on backup power; it goes to dead air once the grid drops below the engine's POWER_DEAD_AT, or once its shelf life (lifespanDays) elapses, whichever comes first. A recorded loop: it never changes, only ages and then stops.

messages.live: This is not a test. A public health emergency has been declared for the entire metropolitan area. Remain indoors. Do not approach anyone displaying signs of infection. Await instructions on this frequency. This message will repeat.
messages.dead: the carrier tone holds for a moment longer, then even that is gone — the loop has finally run down.

notes: Emergency signals read their status from world.powerGrid (weather drains it, T27) and lifespanDays; first-pass dials in sim/radio.ts. Voice/casting pass owed before beta (PL-M4-12 pattern).
